description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a casual urban appearance, featuring a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt with a stylized emblem on the chest and slim-fit jeans. The figure has a distinctive asymmetrical hairstyle with hair swept over one side of the face, partially covering one eye. The arms are slightly bent and held away from the body, and the hands are relaxed. The figure is wearing open-toe heeled sandals, adding to the casual yet stylish look. The facial features are neutral, and the overall build is average. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed adult with an asymmetrical hairstyle, fitted t-shirt, jeans, and heeled sandals, standing with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the emblem on the t-shirt, asymmetrical hairstyle covering one eye, and open-toe sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hair's volume and the profile of the face, as well as the slim fit of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the t-shirt, jeans, and the hairstyle's length and shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's sweep and the figure's relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and slim-fit jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
